prestazioni: Hyundai Lambda II 3.8L GDI V6 (G6DJ) engine: Full bolt-on turbocharger upgrade using a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbo with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe, paired with a PTP Turbo Blanket to reduce heat soak. Supporting mods include a Hyundae-specific AEM 380LPH fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU for precise air-fuel ratio mapping and boost control (targeting 12-14 psi on 93 octane).

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping and 30mm front/20mm rear lowering, paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 18mm rear) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer) to eliminate body roll during aggressive cornering.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the 8-speed automatic transmission (A8TR1-1), upgraded driveshafts with CV joints from Driveshaft Shop (rated for 600 lb-ft torque), and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily clutch kit with a billet steel flywheel for manual transmission swaps (if applicable).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Palisade-specific) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (color code: 3M 1080-M213) and dechromed trim using LUX Blackout vinyl.

OEM+ aggressive front end: Hyundai Genuine Parts N Line grille with a custom laser-cut stainless steel mesh insert (3mm thickness), paired with Morimoto XB LED headlights (DRLs converted to sequential turn signals) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood with a functional heat extractor vent.

Interior overhaul: Recaro Sportster CS seats (front) with custom Alcantara upholstery (color-matched to the exterior), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub with a Momo Mod.78 wheel, and a full custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) from Custom Cages UK, painted in gloss black with red accent stitching.
